name: Sweet Slug
acquisitionSource: Purchase from Mythag Shop - Investigation Exchange

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: Team Unique. If {Annihilation} is unleashed and the Tentacle Stance is switched within 1 turn, the wielder's Shield, Healing, and Final DMG +25% this turn, with a 3-turn cooldown.

lore: A lethal sweetness fills the air. Beware—the cloying grip of death is upon you.
